text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup is almost here. Manhattan Cafe
reflects on all the rivals she's raced against while
following her friend's guidance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week derives her strength from food,
while a hidden ferocity lurks deep within Silence
Suzuka. These are the sources of their running
ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So where does Zenno Rob Roy's get her strength?
She tells us herself—it's her unbreakable spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following her friend's guidance, Manhattan Cafe
begins to gather the pieces she needs to assemble
a strength that's uniquely hers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And the Japan Cup might just be where those
pieces come together.
